note: Repeated holdout results used for paired statistical tests.
Omnibus non-parametric test across three or more paired methods. Rows with incomplete seed-method pairs are excluded per metric.
Pairwise two-sided Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Holm-Bonferroni correction applied within each analysis set and metric.
Tests with fewer paired repeated splits are skipped to avoid unstable reporting.
Because repeated holdout splits are not fully independent, p-values should be interpreted as robustness indicators rather than definitive clinical evidence.
